languages.text: {n}Пальцы Эоганна, нервно теребившие гайку на бороде, резко замирают. Он медленно произносит:{/n} "Ибо каждому орудию воздастся сообразно функции его. Неужели я презрел догматы эксплуатации? Непостижимо! Это требует тщательного анализа и переосмысления священных текстов. Я искал праведника, но надлежало мне исчислить праведность в себе".

{n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."
languages.original_text: {n}Пальцы Эоганна, нервно теребившие гайку на бороде, резко замирают. Он медленно произносит:{/n} "Ибо каждому орудию воздастся сообразно функции его. languages.text: {n}エオガンの指は、髭の金具をいじっていたが、急に止まった。ゆっくりと彼は言った。{/n}「道具は機能によって評価される。私は操作の教義を軽視したのか。考えられない！聖典の徹底的な分析と再解釈が必要だ。私は正義の人を求めていたが、自分の正義を計算すべきだった」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."

traits.locale_text: エゴンの指は、髭の金具をいじっていたが、急に止まった。ゆっくりと彼は言った。「道具は機能によって評価される。私は操作の教義を軽視したのか。考えられない！聖典の徹底的な分析と再解釈が必要だ。私は正義の人を求めていたが、自分の正義を計算すべきだった。」

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡拨弄胡须上螺栓的手指猛然停住。他缓缓说道：{/n}“每件工具都将根据其功能得到奖赏。难道我蔑视了操作教条？简直不可思议！这样说来，我必须对神圣文本进行彻底分析和重新解读。我一直向外寻找正义之人，可我早该思索自己心中的正义了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡拨弄胡须上螺栓的手指猛然停住。他缓缓说道：{/n}“每件工具都将根据其功能得到奖赏。难道我蔑视了操作教条？简直不可思议！这样说来，我必须对神圣文本进行彻底分析和重新解读。我一直向外寻找正义之人，可我早该思索自己心中的正义了。”

languages.text: {n}Les doigts d'Eogunn, qui trituraient nerveusement un boulon dans sa barbe, se figent soudain, puis il déclare lentement :{/n} « Car tous les outils seront récompensés selon leur fonction. Aurais-je bafoué les doctrines d'opération ? C'est inconcevable ! Cette conjecture nécessite une analyse approfondie des textes sacrés suivie de leur réinterprétation. Moi qui cherchais un homme vertueux, j'aurais dû commencer par calculer ma propre vertu. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Les doigts d'Eogunn, qui trituraient nerveusement un boulon dans sa barbe, se figent soudain, puis il déclare lentement :{/n} « Car tous les outils seront récompensés selon leur fonction. Aurais-je bafoué les doctrines d'opération ? C'est inconcevable ! Cette conjecture nécessite une analyse approfondie des textes sacrés suivie de leur réinterprétation. Moi qui cherchais un homme vertueux, j'aurais dû commencer par calculer ma propre vertu. »

languages.text: {n}Los dedos de Eogunn, que jugueteaban nerviosos con un tornillo en su barba, se detienen de inmediato. Dice con lentitud:{/n} «Pues cada herramienta recibirá una recompensa acorde a su función. ¿He violado las doctrinas de operación? ¡Es inconcebible! Esto exige un análisis exhaustivo y una reinterpretación de los textos sagrados. Buscaba la virtud en el hombre, pero debería haber calculado la virtud en mi interior».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Los dedos de Eogunn, que jugueteaban nerviosos con un tornillo en su barba, se detienen de inmediato. Dice con lentitud:{/n} «Pues cada herramienta recibirá una recompensa acorde a su función. ¿He violado las doctrinas de operación? ¡Es inconcebible! Esto exige un análisis exhaustivo y una reinterpretación de los textos sagrados. Buscaba la virtud en el hombre, pero debería haber calculado la virtud en mi interior».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn'un, sakalındaki bir cıvatayla gergin bir şekilde oynayan parmakları aniden duruyor. Yavaşça konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Her araç işlevine göre ödüllendirilir. İşleyiş doktrinlerini hor görmüş olabilir miyim? Akıl almaz bir şey bu! Kutsal metinleri kapsamlıca analiz etmek ve yeniden yorumlamak gerek. Doğruluk timsali bir adam arıyordum ama kendimdeki doğruluğumu hesaba katmadım."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn'un, sakalındaki bir cıvatayla gergin bir şekilde oynayan parmakları aniden duruyor. Yavaşça konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Her araç işlevine göre ödüllendirilir. İşleyiş doktrinlerini hor görmüş olabilir miyim? Akıl almaz bir şey bu! Kutsal metinleri kapsamlıca analiz etmek ve yeniden yorumlamak gerek. Doğruluk timsali bir adam arıyordum ama kendimdeki doğruluğumu hesaba katmadım."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, der gerade noch nervös mit einem Bolzen an seinem Bart gespielt hatte, erstarrt. Er sagt langsam: {/n} "Jedes Werkzeug möge gemäß seiner Funktion belohnt werden. Habe ich die Doktrinen des Betriebs missachtet? Das ist unvorstellbar! Das schreit nach einer gründlichen Analyse und Neuinterpretation der heiligen Texte. Ich suchte einen rechtschaffenen Mann, hätte aber meine eigene Rechtschaffenheit berechnen sollen."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn's fingers, which were nervously fiddling with a bolt on his beard, stop abruptly. He slowly says,{/n} "For every tool shall be rewarded according to its function. Have I scorned the doctrines of operation? It is inconceivable! This calls for thorough analysis and reinterpretation of the sacred texts. I was seeking a righteous man, but I should have calculated the righteousness in myself."
